mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.is_stock, t0.litigation_id, t0.project_id, t0.law_firm_id, t0.register_id, t0.preservation_code,t0.preserve_type,t0.preserve_apply_date,t0.preserve_rule_date,t0.insure_money, t0.details_date, t0.details_description, t0.litigation_type, t0.title, t0.remarks, t0.flow_state, t0.is_deleted
